calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for Imelda Siao. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

The Court stated that everything appeared to be in order. Mr. Ferdon stated that the Phillipine Consulate was not given notice. The Court stated that they were to be given notice prior to final distribution. Discussions regarding an additional bank account were held. Mr. Ferdon stated that it would be up to the daughter and wife to ask for the funds. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Continued To Mar-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for Imelda Siao. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

At the request of the moving Party and there being no objection by Mr. Ferdon, the Court continued the matter to March 30, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McDaniels.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-23-2009 Continued To Mar-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Continued To Feb-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for Imelda Siao. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

The Court stated that notice to the Philippine consulate and a declaration from the surviving Spouse indicating that the property was community property, not seperate property, was needed. Mr. Crisostomo explained that this was a problematic issue. The Court suggested sending a copy of the petition along with the supplemental petition to the Consulate here in San Francisco. Mr. Ferdon stated stated that Counsel may want to file a petition to waive notice to the Consulate and then file the Petition For Spousal Property. The matter was continued to Febraury 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the supplement to the petition with information as to why notice should be waived.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA").

Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA had priority. The Court will appoint the SFPA as the Administrator, (subject to a written order).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Continued To Aug-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
